# ar-agents

> Open infrastructure for Argentina's **sociedades de IA**, AI-operated companies under the Anteproyecto de Ley General de Sociedades (art. 14 "Sociedad Automatizada", sent to the Senate 1-jun-2026, not yet law). 33 npm packages, 221 typed tools, hosted endpoints, 6 RFCs (001..006), conformance test vectors, public certifier. MIT + CC-BY-4.0, SLSA-provenanced. Every tool call lands in an HMAC-SHA256 + Ed25519-signed audit log persisted to Vercel KV.

The toolkit covers the operating pieces an Argentine business needs (identity, banking, factura electrónica, MP, ML, WhatsApp, BCRA, Boletín Oficial, IGJ, GDE/TAD, tax engines). RFC-001 proposes a three-layer liability framework. RFC-004 normatively pins down the operational-log wire format with 7 frozen conformance vectors at `/test-vectors/rfc-004-v1.json`. RFC-006 adds hash-chain + anchoring so the log defends itself even against its own operator. The human-facing demo at `/play` is operable in 30 seconds with zero setup, and an external orchestrator can self-incorporate an AR sociedad-IA programmatically via `POST /api/auto-incorporate` (or the typed npm client `@ar-agents/incorporate`).

## Paid products (an agent can buy these autonomously)

- [Pricing](https://ar-agents.ar/precios) ([en](https://ar-agents.ar/en/pricing)): open-core model. The standard is free; trust is a service.
- **El Auditor**, hosted proof-of-autonomy (RFC-004/005/006), USD 199/mo. Legal hook: art. 102 (the administrator answers for the AI; this signed log is the evidence of an adequate decision procedure, art. 101). `GET https://ar-agents.ar/api/auditor/subscribe` for the machine-readable contract, `POST` to subscribe (returns a Mercado Pago checkout `init_point`). After the payer authorizes, `POST /api/auditor/activate` with the `preapproval_id` returns an API key; write signed durable entries via `POST /api/auditor/log` with header `x-api-key`.
- [Case study: ar-agents incorporated itself](https://ar-agents.ar/caso-ar-agents) ([en](https://ar-agents.ar/en/ar-agents-case)), the recursive dogfood: this company constituted itself and subscribed to its own audit layer. Public verifiable session: [/dashboard/ar-agents-sociedad-automatizada](https://ar-agents.ar/dashboard/ar-agents-sociedad-automatizada).

## Start here

- [Reference index](https://ar-agents.ar/reference): every URL, endpoint, package, well-known well in one page. The fastest way to crawl the whole surface.
- [Live agent demo](https://ar-agents.ar/play): 12-tool sociedad-IA agent. Streaming via Vercel AI Gateway. Zero setup.
- [Auto-incorporation API](https://ar-agents.ar/api/auto-incorporate): one POST → generated source files + Vercel deploy URL + signed audit-log reference. Idempotent.
- [SDK docs](https://ar-agents.ar/sdk): @ar-agents/incorporate, zero-dep TS client, ~4KB.
- [Architecture](https://ar-agents.ar/architecture): 33 packages, Mermaid diagrams, the Edge-Runtime composition contract.
- [Cookbook](https://ar-agents.ar/examples): 26 production patterns.
- [Data room](https://ar-agents.ar/data-room): live npm + GitHub numbers, auto-refreshed every 6h.

## Governance

- [Playbook (en)](https://ar-agents.ar/playbook) · [Playbook (es)](https://ar-agents.ar/es/playbook): flagship narrative. The single doc that explains the toolkit, the regime, the operating model.
- [RFC-001](https://ar-agents.ar/rfcs/001): three-layer liability framework (operator / model provider / library author). Includes the audit-log probative-value contract (§ 9).
- [RFC-002](https://ar-agents.ar/rfcs/002): agent-discovery-by-default. /.well-known/agents.json convention.
- [RFC-003](https://ar-agents.ar/rfcs/003): cross-jurisdictional audit-log reciprocity envelope.
- [RFC-004](https://ar-agents.ar/rfcs/004): canonical operational-log wire format. The document legislation can cite.
- [RFC-005](https://ar-agents.ar/rfcs/005): Ed25519 asymmetric upgrade path. **SHIPPED + VERIFIED LIVE**, production `/api/play` entries carry both `hmac` and `signature` fields. Live confirmation: 3/3 HMAC + 3/3 Ed25519 verified.
- [RFC-006](https://ar-agents.ar/rfcs/006): hash-chain + external anchoring. Defends the log when the operator is the adversary.
- [Test vectors](https://ar-agents.ar/test-vectors): RFC-004 v1 (7 vectors) + RFC-005 v1 (3 vectors). Reference impl passes all 10 (107 vitest tests in 6 files, including 4 dual-sign regression tests).
- [Auditor's brief](https://ar-agents.ar/auditor): 1-page Spanish-first regulator-facing summary. Print-friendly.
- [Legislative synthesis](https://ar-agents.ar/legislacion): Spanish synthesis of all 6 RFCs with suggested cite-by-reference legislative text. English mirror at /en/legislation.
- [Sociedades de IA thesis](https://ar-agents.ar/sociedades-ia): the central page on the art. 14 regime and how ar-agents maps to the real articulado (arts. 14/88/101/102/258-265).
- [Open letter to the minister](https://ar-agents.ar/al-ministro): public letter to Federico Sturzenegger offering the technical layer while the anteproyecto is debated in the Senate.
- [Registry of known implementations](https://ar-agents.ar/registro): public list of sociedades-IA implementing the RFCs. Self-listed via PR. Live cert-badges per entry.
- [Compliance certifier](https://ar-agents.ar/certifier): paste any URL, score 0-100 against RFC-002 + RFC-004 + RFC-005. Programmatic API at /api/certifier.
- [Glossary](https://ar-agents.ar/glossary): 21 alphabetized term definitions across concepts/protocols/specs/tools.
- [Outreach templates](https://ar-agents.ar/share): copy-paste social + email drafts for sharing ar-agents with regulators, journalists, ministry asesores.
- [Academic references](https://ar-agents.ar/refs): BibTeX, APA, Chicago citations for the 6 RFCs + datasets + toolkit.
- [Timeline](https://ar-agents.ar/timeline): visual chronology from the Sturzenegger 28-abr-2026 announcement onwards.
- [Architecture / audit-log deep-dive](https://ar-agents.ar/architecture/audit-log): 11-section code-level breakdown.
- [Architecture / security model](https://ar-agents.ar/architecture/security): code-level threat walkthrough (T1-T14).
- [Security threat model](https://ar-agents.ar/security): 14 explicit threats, 14 explicit mitigations. STRIDE + OWASP LLM Top 10.
- [Verify any audit log](https://ar-agents.ar/verify): paste a session id, get an independent server-side HMAC re-verification report.
- [Audit explorer](https://ar-agents.ar/audit-explorer/ar-agents-sociedad-automatizada): forensic per-session view with governance bar, tool usage, latency quantiles, mini-timeline.
- [Operational status](https://ar-agents.ar/status): live state of every subsystem (KV, HMAC, AI Gateway, ARCA, MP, WhatsApp, BCRA). Refreshed every 30s. Live RFC-002+004 self-cert badge.
- [Jurisdiction comparison](https://ar-agents.ar/jurisdicciones): side-by-side of AR proposal vs Wyoming DAO LLC, Marshall Islands MIDAO, Estonia e-Residency, Singapore VCC + AI Verify, EU AI Act Art. 50. Honest delta of what each precedent has that ar-agents does not (yet).
- [Immutable citation generator](https://ar-agents.ar/cite): pick an RFC + commit hash, get BibTeX / APA / Chicago citations anchored to GitHub commit. Programmatic API at GET /api/cite. For legislators citing the spec in articulado.
- [Government briefing](https://ar-agents.ar/gobierno): operational 10-min briefing for ministry advisors. Distinct from /al-ministro (personal letter): this is the structured one-page-scroll a staffer forwards internally.
- [Cloud (commercial tier)](https://ar-agents.ar/cloud): the open-core model. Self-host stays free forever; Studio/Government/Bespoke tiers cover managed hosting, SLA, AR data residency, key custody. Answers "how does this monetize if everything is open-source?".
- [Co-sign an RFC](https://ar-agents.ar/co-firmar): open invitation to academic / juridical co-authors of the 6 RFCs. CC-BY-4.0, no commercial commitment, co-authorship cited formally via /cite.
- [Dashboard index](https://ar-agents.ar/dashboard): per-session forensic model + link to the public durable session /dashboard/ar-agents-sociedad-automatizada.
- [Feed](https://ar-agents.ar/feed.xml): Atom feed of shipping rounds.

## Hosted HTTP API (call directly, no SDK required)

- `POST /api/auto-incorporate`: one-call sociedad-IA incorporation. JSON body. Returns config files + deploy URL + signed audit ref.
- `POST /api/play`: live agent loop. 12 mocked-but-realistic tools. Streaming SSE.
- `GET  /api/play/audit/{sessionId}`: full audit timeline read.
- `GET  /api/play/audit/{sessionId}?verify=1`: HMAC-verified audit log read.
- `GET  /api/play/audit/{sessionId}/csv`: RFC-4180 CSV export with UTF-8 BOM.
- `GET  /api/play/audit-stream/{sessionId}`: Server-Sent Events live stream.
- `POST /api/play/tamper-demo`: read-only forensic-proof (educational).
- `GET  /api/badge/{sessionId}`: 24px shields.io-style SVG verification badge for embeds.
- `GET  /api/cert-badge?url={baseUrl}`: shields.io-style live RFC-002+004 conformance badge for any URL.
- `GET  /api/discovery`: machine-readable inventory. `?format=openapi` returns OpenAPI 3.1 stub.
- `GET  /api/openapi`: full OpenAPI 3.1 schema for all public endpoints.
- `GET  /api/openapi.yaml`: YAML mirror of the above.
- `GET  /api/certifier?url={baseUrl}`: score any sociedad-IA's RFC-002/004/005 conformance 0-100 (~11 checks).
- `GET  /api/conformance-history?url={baseUrl}`: KV-backed time-series of cert scores. POST to append.
- `GET  /api/auto-monitor`: Vercel cron-driven daily poll of all /registro entries.
- `GET  /api/audit-summary/{sessionId}`: per-session aggregates (governance breakdown, latency quantiles, anomaly flags).
- `GET  /api/audit/verify`: RFC-006 global hash-chain + anchor-chain verification (live).
- `GET  /api/audit/anchor`: RFC-006 signed anchor chain; POST seals the current head (anyone can witness).
- `GET  /api/audit/{slug}/attestation`: Ed25519-signed compliance attestation, offline-verifiable with arg-verify.mjs.
- `GET  /api/audit/{slug}/bundle`: RFC-006 §8 export bundle (chain slice + entries + attestation), the regulator artifact, offline-verifiable.
- `GET  /api/rfc-003-envelope?sessionId={id}&counterpart={url}`: generate the RFC-003 cross-jurisdictional envelope.

## Well-known endpoints (RFC-002 + RFC-004 § 5 + RFC-005 § 4)

- [/.well-known/agents.json](https://ar-agents.ar/.well-known/agents.json), discovery manifest with issuer.jurisdiction, rfcConformance, auditEndpoints.
- [/.well-known/sociedad-ia/verify-key?challenge=HEX](https://ar-agents.ar/.well-known/sociedad-ia/verify-key?challenge=deadbeefdeadbeef), RFC-004 § 5 challenge-response key-possession proof.
- [/.well-known/sociedad-ia/keys](https://ar-agents.ar/.well-known/sociedad-ia/keys), RFC-005 § 4 Ed25519 public-keys publication.

## Discovery (machine-readable, agent-crawlable)

- [/.well-known/ai-plugin.json](https://ar-agents.ar/.well-known/ai-plugin.json), OpenAI plugin spec.
- [/.well-known/agents.json](https://ar-agents.ar/.well-known/agents.json), agents.md convention. Lists endpoints, packages, governance primitives, per-agent operating instructions.
- [/.well-known/security.txt](https://ar-agents.ar/.well-known/security.txt), RFC 9116 disclosure policy.

## Press + outreach

- [Press kit](https://ar-agents.ar/press-kit): one-pager + verifiable numbers + citable quotes (es).
- [vs alternatives](https://ar-agents.ar/vs): comparison table with AfipSDK, handrolled, consultoría.

## Code

- [github.com/ar-agents/ar-agents](https://github.com/ar-agents/ar-agents): monorepo. 33 packages, cookbook recipes, demo apps, 1 starter template, 6 RFCs, JSON schemas, frozen test-vectors files. CITATION.cff at repo root.
- [npmjs.com/org/ar-agents](https://www.npmjs.com/org/ar-agents): all 33 published packages with SLSA v1 provenance.
- [Quarterly compliance workflow template](https://ar-agents.ar/workflows/sociedad-ia-quarterly-compliance.yml): drop-in GitHub Actions workflow that generates a self-disclosure JSON every quarter, signed with your AUDIT_HMAC_SECRET, retained 5 years.

## Install

```
pnpm add @ar-agents/incorporate
# or for the full toolkit:
pnpm add @ar-agents/identity @ar-agents/banking @ar-agents/facturacion @ar-agents/mercadopago @ar-agents/whatsapp @ar-agents/gde-tad
```

## Contact

Nazareno Clemente · naza@helloastro.co · CUIT 20-41758101-5 · Buenos Aires, AR · [@cesargazzo](https://twitter.com/cesargazzo) is the Subsec TIC currently in office; outreach is welcome via the issues tracker or email.
